case_title: RITA PISCIOTTA VS. JEREMY M LIVIANU ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PISCIOTTA, RITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVIANU, JEREMY M LAIKEN, HANNAH $925.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $955.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $536.73 AGAINST THE JUDGMENT WHICH IS AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANTS HAVE ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF'S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,363.27 FILED BY PISCIOTTA, RITA AS TO DEFENDANT LIVIANU, JEREMY M LAIKEN, HANNAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL RETURNED: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
